title: Charlotte Hawkins
compiled_truth: Charlotte Hawkins is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-16 to 2000-08-10), Charlotte Hawkins sent 15 and received 72 emails, totalling 87 interactions.
